AirVent.title: Air vent
AirVent.description: Vents atmosphere into a room, but only if connected to an oxygen generator via ducting.

LifeSupport.title: Life support
LifeSupport.description: Generates a small amount of oxygen which can be dispersed through vents, and also filters and cleans hazardous gasses and CO2 from the atmosphere.

OxygenGenerator.title: Oxygen generator
OxygenGenerator.description: Generates oxygen which can be dispersed through vents.

LargeOxygenGenerator.title: Large Oxygen generator
LargeOxygenGenerator.description: Generates a large quantity of oxygen which can be dispersed through vents.

GasScrubber.title: Gas scrubber
GasScrubber.description: Filters and cleans hazardous gasses and CO2 from the atmosphere.

OxygenTank.title: Oxygen tank
OxygenTank.description: Stores a small amount of oxygen.
